If he takes 20% of the days between March 1st and April 19th off, and helps people on all the other days, how many people does he help? After helping people, Billy also decides to take a 15-minute break every hour to drink a cup of coffee that contains 95 milligrams of caffeine. He also spends 30 minutes each day to organize his paperwork. (Remember there are 31 days in March.)"

The mathproxyagent calculates total days 50, working days 40, people per day 6, total people 240. The assistant confirms. The answer is 240.
